category_sources: source_facts.description says CLI tool that runs a command and highlights STDERR output; official SourceForge page says it is designed mainly for builds
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hilite; official SourceForge project title is hilite
docs_sources: official SourceForge project page is the best available documentation surface, with summary, files, support, news, and project details
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project provides downloads and project pages but no official source-control repository was identified
tags_sources: official SourceForge page describes highlighting stderr output, intended use with builds, and C as the programming language
